name: Yatta
description: Yatta is a piñata with a vibrant color palette. She has two piñata points on her head that stick straight up and resembles horns, with strands of ribbons consisting of sky-blue and bright yellow. Her face is mostly covered in sky-blue and bright yellow, with a smaller dash of pink in the middle of her face, with a circular form resembling the letter m. A simple, toothy grin with three teeth stretches across her face. Her arms are mostly bright yellow, with 2 pink and sky-blue stripes forming two bracelet-like markings residing near her hands; Yatta's legs have a similar pattern. Her body contains colorful stripes of pink, sky-blue, and bright yellow, reminiscent of the traditional paper fringe of a piñata. She has four long tails, which are slightly a darker pink, flat, and the 2 upper tails being longer than the lower two.
creator: Oren-from-sprunki232
